parents.subject: LU-19829 hsm: set dirty flag on archive failure

commit.subject: LU-19772 build: Improve o2iblnd path detection
commit.message:
LU-19772 build: Improve o2iblnd path detection

config/lustre-lnet.m4 provides a unified way to detect o2iblnd
path but it cannot retrieve o2iblnd path in some cases (e.g
mlnx-ofa_kernel-source and mlnx-ofa_kernel-dksm) so improve
it by adding a default path.

Also remove the duplicated check in lustre-dkms_pre-build.sh.

Test-Parameters: trivial testgroup=full-dkms
Signed-off-by: Xiao Yang <xyang@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I40ee29d4e701da7e46f2248a3ed487a37be87ee2
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/63310
Reviewed-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
